            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="保存为...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    # ================= 逻辑模块 1: 勘察号展开 =================
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text) # 统一分隔符
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    # ================= 逻辑模块 2: 文件名缩短 (增强版 v3.2) =================
    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str:
                    num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError:
                num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]

        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive:
                current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group:
                    new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 辅助：查找 PDF 核心逻辑 =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        """
        双重搜索：
        1. 先找 sub_path (Level 2) 下的 pdf
        2. 如果没找到，再找 l1_path (Level 1) 下名字包含 sub_name 的 pdf
        """
        found_pdf = None
        
        # 策略 1: 在子文件夹 (Level 2) 内查找
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub:
                return pdfs_in_sub[0] # 找到即返回
        
        # 策略 2: 在父文件夹 (Level 1) 内查找
        # 匹配规则：文件名包含子文件夹名，且以 .pdf 结尾
        # 例如子文件夹是 "K2018-0246（1-1）"，我们要找 "K2018-0246（1-1）.pdf"
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                # 简单粗暴匹配：PDF 文件名必须包含子文件夹的名字
                if sub_name in pdf.name:
                    return pdf
                    
        return None

    # ================= 主流程 =================
    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        # 1. 预扫描
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷文件夹。")

            # 2. 深入处理
            table_rows = []
            
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # --- 分支 A: 有子文件夹 (Level 2) ---
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        # 提取分卷序号
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        
                        # 统计页数 (Level 3 or Level 2)
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        # 查找 PDF (双重搜索)
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        
                        if target_pdf:
                            # 1. 拼接新名字
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            # 2. 缩短
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            
                            # 3. 移动
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")
                        else:
                            self.log(f"  [警告] 未找到分册 PDF: {sub.name}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                # --- 分支 B: 无子文件夹 (Level 1) ---
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    # 直接找 Level 1 下的 PDF
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # 3. 写入 Excel
            if table_rows:
                df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                df = df[cols]
                df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"\n✅ 全部完成！Excel 已保存至: {excel_path}")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", "全流程处理完毕！")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

💡 核心变化点

在 find_target_pdf 函数中，我实现了：

Look inside Level 2：首先检查子文件夹里有没有 PDF。

Look inside Level 1 (Backup)：如果子文件夹里是空的，程序会回到父文件夹，寻找文件名中包含子文件夹名（例如 ...1-1.pdf）的文件。

这样无论 PDF 放在哪一层，只要它存在，就一定会被抓出来处理并归档！

这个报错（line 235, in <module>）是一个非常典型的 Python 缩进（Indentation）错误。

这意味着在你粘贴代码时，run_process 函数里面的逻辑没有正确地“缩进”到类（Class）和函数（Def）内部，导致 Python 把 self.log(...) 当作了整个脚本最外层的代码来执行。因为最外层没有定义 self，所以程序直接崩溃了。

这个版本我特意优化了代码结构，防止缩进错误，并增强了 PDF 搜索的稳定性。

import re

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 类定义开始

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root

        self.root.geometry("900x700")

                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        # 主面板
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        # 路径选择器

        # 日志
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

        else:

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:

                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 辅助：双重搜索 PDF =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        """
        1. 优先找子文件夹内的 PDF
        2. 如果没有，退回父文件夹找包含子文件夹名的 PDF
        """
        # 策略 1: 在子文件夹 (Level 2) 内查找
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub:
                return pdfs_in_sub[0] # 找到即返回
        
        # 策略 2: 在父文件夹 (Level 1) 内查找
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name:
                    return pdf
                    
        return None

    # ================= 主流程 =================
    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):

                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷文件夹。")

            # 2. 深入处理
            table_rows = []

                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # --- 分支 A: 有子文件夹 ---
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        # 提取分卷序号
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        
                        # 统计页数
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        # 查找 PDF (双重搜索)
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        
                        if target_pdf:
                            # 1. 拼接新名字
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            # 2. 缩短
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            
                            # 3. 移动
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")
                        else:
                            self.log(f"  [警告] 未找到分册 PDF: {sub.name}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                # --- 分支 B: 无子文件夹 ---
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # 3. 写入 Excel
            if table_rows:
                df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                df = df[cols]
                df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"\n✅ 全部完成！Excel 已保存至: {excel_path}")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", "全流程处理完毕！")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))
# ==========================================
# 类定义结束
# ==========================================

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

这是一个非常实用的需求！这就相当于要把这个工具变成一个**“台账数据库”**录入工具，而不仅仅是单次的生成器。

为了实现**“自动累积更新”**（Append Mode），我修改了最后生成 Excel 的逻辑：

检测：程序会先看一眼你指定的 Excel 路径下有没有文件。

读取：如果有文件，它会先把旧数据读进来。

追加：把这次新扫描到的数据拼接到旧数据后面。

去重：（贴心功能） 为了防止你手滑对同一个文件夹扫了两次导致数据重复，我加了自动去重功能。如果整行数据完全一样，它会自动只保留一条。

Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 类定义开始
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v6.0")
        self.root.geometry("900x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        # 变量
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 顶部
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        # 主面板
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        # 路径选择器
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 按钮
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        # 日志
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            # 这里改为 askopenfilename 或者 asksaveasfilename 都可以，为了方便选择已有文件，这里稍微变通一下逻辑
            # 我们用 asksaveasfilename 允许用户新建，也可以选已有的
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    # ================= 逻辑模块 1: 勘察号展开 =================
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text) # 统一分隔符
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    # ================= 逻辑模块 2: 文件名缩短 (增强版) =================
    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 辅助：双重搜索 PDF =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    # ================= 主流程 =================
    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        # 1. 预扫描
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            # 2. 深入处理
            table_rows = []
            
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 核心修改：累积写入 Excel =================
            if table_rows:
                # 1. 准备新数据
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                # 2. 检查是否已有文件
                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        # 3. 合并数据
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        # 4. 去重 (如果完全一样的行，就不重复添加)
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                            
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败 (可能被占用或格式错误)，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                # 5. 保存
                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))
# ==========================================
# 类定义结束
# ==========================================

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

💡 如何使用累积功能？

第一次使用：

在“3. 总台账文件路径”里，点击“选择/新建”，找一个位置，输入文件名（比如 总台账.xlsx），保存。

运行程序。程序会创建这个新文件。

第二次及以后使用：

处理第二个源文件夹时，不要改动“3. 总台账文件路径”里的地址（或者重新选择那个 总台账.xlsx）。

运行程序。程序会发现文件已存在，自动把新数据追加到最后一行。

这样不管你分多少次整理，最后永远只有这一份完整、去重后的总表！

默认的“羽毛”图标是 Python tkinter 界面库自带的。要把它改成你自己的 app.ico，我们需要在代码里显式地告诉程序：“运行时请加载这个图标文件”。

我为你更新了代码 (v6.1)，主要改动是在启动时增加了一行 iconbitmap 命令。

代码里默认设定图标文件名为 app.ico。
在运行代码或运行生成的 exe 时，请务必确保 app.ico 文件和程序在同一个文件夹里，否则它找不到图标就会变回默认的羽毛（我在代码里加了防崩溃保护，找不到文件也不会报错，只是不显示）。

Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 类定义开始
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v6.1")
        self.root.geometry("900x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # --- 核心修改：设置窗口运行时的图标 ---
        # 尝试加载 app.ico，如果文件不存在则忽略（防止报错）
        try:
            if os.path.exists("app.ico"):
                self.root.iconbitmap("app.ico")
        except Exception:
            pass
        # ----------------------------------

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        # 变量
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 顶部
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        # 主面板
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        # 路径选择器
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 按钮
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        # 日志
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    # ================= 逻辑模块 1: 勘察号展开 =================
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text) # 统一分隔符
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    # ================= 逻辑模块 2: 文件名缩短 (增强版) =================
    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 辅助：双重搜索 PDF =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    # ================= 主流程 =================
    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        # 1. 预扫描
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            # 2. 深入处理
            table_rows = []
            
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 核心修改：累积写入 Excel =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                            
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))
# ==========================================
# 类定义结束
# ==========================================

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

pyinstaller --noconsole --onefile --icon=app.ico PDF助手.py

你说

可以打包时把图标一起打包进去吗，这样就不用还要另放一个app.ico
可以打包时把图标一起打包进去吗，这样就不用还要另放一个app.ico
(思维链未展开)

这是完全可以的！

你现在的困惑在于：PyInstaller 的 --icon 参数只是给了 EXE 文件一个外壳图标（在桌面上看得到的那个），但并没有把图标文件“塞进”程序内部供代码调用（窗口左上角的那个）。

要实现“单文件无依赖，且窗口也有图标”，我们需要做两步修改：

修改代码：加入一段“寻址逻辑”，让程序能找到被打包进临时文件夹的图标。

修改打包命令：使用 --add-data 参数把图标真正塞进 EXE 的肚子里。

📁 第一步：使用 v6.2 最终版代码

请全选复制覆盖。核心变化是增加了一个 resource_path 函数，用来定位打包后的资源。

Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import sys  # 新增：需要用到 sys
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 辅助函数：资源路径定位
# ==========================================
def resource_path(relative_path):
    """ 
    获取资源的绝对路径。
    PyInstaller 会把资源解压到 sys._MEIPASS 临时目录下，
    这个函数能确保无论是在开发环境还是打包后，都能找到文件。
    """
    try:
        # PyInstaller 创建的临时目录
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        # 正常开发的当前目录
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")

    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

# ==========================================
# 类定义开始
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v6.2")
        self.root.geometry("900x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # --- 核心修改：使用 resource_path 加载内置图标 ---
        icon_file = resource_path("app.ico")
        # 只有当文件确实存在时（打包进去了或者目录下有）才加载
        if os.path.exists(icon_file):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_file)
            except Exception:
                pass # 防止图标格式兼容性问题导致报错
        # ----------------------------------------------

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        # 变量
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 顶部
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        # 主面板
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        # 路径选择器
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 按钮
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        # 日志
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:

        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    # ================= 逻辑模块 1: 勘察号展开 =================

        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text) # 统一分隔符

    # ================= 逻辑模块 2: 文件名缩短 (增强版) =================
    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:

                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()

                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']

                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 辅助：双重搜索 PDF =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    # ================= 主流程 =================
    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

📦 第二步：使用新的打包命令

这一步非常关键！你需要告诉 PyInstaller：“嘿，打包的时候顺便把 app.ico 也给我塞进去！”

请确保 PDF助手.py 和 app.ico 在同一个文件夹下，然后在终端运行：

Bash
pyinstaller --noconsole --onefile --icon=app.ico --add-data "app.ico;." PDF助手.py


--icon=app.ico：这是给 EXE 文件 本身穿的衣服（文件图标）。

--add-data "app.ico;."：这是把图标打包进 EXE 内部（供代码调用，作为窗口图标）。

注意引号和分号。

app.ico 是源文件。

; 是 Windows 分隔符。

. 是目标位置（EXE 内部的根目录）。

打包完成后，你得到的 EXE 无论是放在哪里运行（哪怕把原始的 app.ico 删了），它的左上角窗口图标都会正常显示了！

你说

如图exe的窗口标题图标变了，但是还有一个图标还是默认的羽毛这个在哪里改
如图exe的窗口标题图标变了，但是还有一个图标还是默认的羽毛这个在哪里改
(思维链未展开)

这是一个非常经典的 Windows 任务栏图标问题。

你现在的情况是：

文件图标（EXE 文件本身）：已通过 PyInstaller 修改，成功。

窗口左上角图标：已通过代码 iconbitmap 修改，成功。

任务栏图标（底部栏）：依然是羽毛（默认）。

原因：Windows 任务栏会把 Python 程序默认识别为“通用程序”，所以它会自动用默认图标覆盖你的自定义图标。
解决办法：我们需要在代码里“告诉” Windows：“嘿，我是一个独立的应用程序，我有自己的身份证号（AppID）！”这样 Windows 就会乖乖显示你的图标了。

我为你准备了 v6.3 最终完美版。我只增加了几行设置 AppID 的代码，请全选复制覆盖。

📁 完整修复代码 (v6.3 任务栏图标修复版)
Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes  # 新增：用于调用 Windows API
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 辅助函数：资源路径定位
# ==========================================
def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

# ==========================================
# 类定义
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v6.3")
        self.root.geometry("900x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # --- 核心修改：设置窗口图标 (左上角) ---
        icon_file = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_file):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_file)
            except Exception:
                pass
        # ------------------------------------

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({

                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):

                        after_dedup = len(final_df)

                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")

                else:

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    # --- 核心修改：设置 AppUserModelID 修复任务栏图标 ---
    try:
        # 设置一个唯一的 ID，告诉 Windows 这是一个独立的程序，不是普通的 Python 脚本
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v6.3' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass
    # -----------------------------------------------

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()
