这是一个非常典型的 Windows 11 图标缓存机制 导致的问题。

结论： 是的，Windows 11 对任务栏图标的管理比 Win10 更“固执”。如果你的 EXE 文件名没变，Windows 11 会直接从缓存里调取旧图标（也就是那个羽毛），而忽略你新打包进去的图标。

请按以下 三个步骤 操作，通常只需操作第一步就能解决，如果不行再用终极代码。

🛠️ 步骤一：最简单的“物理”修复（必试）

不要改代码，直接改文件名。

把生成的 PDF助手.exe 重命名为 PDF助手_v2.exe 或者任何没用过的名字。

再次运行。

原因：改名会强制 Windows 11 把它当作一个新程序，从而重新去读取 EXE 内部的图标资源，而不是读缓存。

🛠️ 步骤二：清理图标缓存（如果不想改名）

如果你非要用原名，或者改名后还不行，可以尝试刷新缓存：

打开任务管理器 -> 重启 "Windows 资源管理器"。

或者：把这个 exe 复制到另一个文件夹（比如 D 盘）再运行试试。

💻 步骤三：代码级终极修复 (v6.4)

如果上面两招都不行，说明代码里注册图标的时机不够早。我修改了代码结构，在窗口创建的一瞬间就强行注入图标，并增加了对子窗口图标的强制覆盖。

请使用这份 v6.4 代码，它专门针对 Windows 11 做了优化。

Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 辅助函数：资源路径定位
# ==========================================
def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

# ==========================================
# 类定义
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v6.4")
        self.root.geometry("900x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # --- Win11 专属修复：强制设置全局图标 ---
        # 这一步必须在所有界面元素创建前执行
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                # 方法1: 设置窗口图标
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                # 方法2: 强制将此图标作为该程序所有子窗口的默认图标 (关键)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path) 
            except Exception:
                pass
        # ------------------------------------

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])([^（）\(\)]+)([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)（(\d+)）（(.*)）$')

        try:
            for entry in os.scandir(root_dir):
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'（\d+-(\d+)）', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                last_paren_idx = max(sub.name.rfind("（"), sub.name.rfind("("))
                                suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

有个小问题，pdf归档那一步，有些在level1层级的pdf没有被识别到，比如图中这种情况。分册在level2层级的，之前做过优化都能识别到

这是一个非常敏锐的发现！

通过你提供的截图 emobile_2026-02-13_08-36-06.png，我找到了两个关键原因导致这些 PDF 被漏掉：

“同级”PDF 未被扫描：

目前的逻辑是：先看文件夹里面有没有 PDF，如果没有，就去父级找。

漏掉的情况：截图中的 PDF（如 K2018-0053...pdf）是和文件夹（K2018-0053...）并列存放在根目录下的（即“兄弟关系”）。我的旧代码只往里看，没往旁边看。

括号和空格格式不兼容：

截图中的文件夹名是 K2018-0053 ( 2 ) ...（注意：是英文括号，且数字两边有空格）。

旧代码的正则只认 （2）（中文括号无空格）。这导致程序根本没把这个文件夹认作是“符合条件的卷”，自然也就不会去处理它对应的 PDF 了。

🚀 修复方案 (v7.0 增强识别版)

我为你更新了代码，做了以下三个重大升级：

全能正则：现在同时支持中文括号 （）、英文括号 ()，以及括号里可能出现的空格（如 ( 2 )）。

兄弟文件搜索：在处理“无子文件夹”的卷时，如果文件夹里没 PDF，程序会自动去根目录找有没有同名的 PDF 文件。

越级搜索：在处理“有子文件夹”的分册时，如果里里外外都找不到，也会去根目录搜一下有没有对应名字的 PDF。

import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 辅助函数：资源路径定位
# ==========================================
def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

# ==========================================
# 类定义
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v7.0")
        self.root.geometry("950x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # 强制设置图标 (Win11 修复)
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        # 增强版正则：兼容英文括号、中文括号和括号内的空格
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                # 保持原括号风格，但去除多余空格
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    # ================= 核心：三重搜索 PDF =================
    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        """
        1. 找子文件夹 (Level 2)
        2. 找父文件夹 (Level 1)
        3. 找根目录 (Level 0) - 新增
        """
        # 1. 子文件夹内
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        # 2. 父文件夹内 (文件名包含子文件夹名)
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        # 3. 根目录内 (文件名包含子文件夹名) - 解决兄弟文件问题
        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
                
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        
        # --- 增强版正则：支持 ( 2 ) 这种带空格和英文括号的格式 ---
        # 解释：
        # K\d{4}-\d+  -> 匹配 K2018-0053
        # \s* -> 允许 K 号后面有空格
        # [（\(]      -> 中文或英文左括号
        # \s*(\d+)\s* -> 匹配数字，且允许前后有空格，如 ( 2 )
        # [）\)]      -> 中文或英文右括号
        # ... 后面的勘察号部分同理
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

        try:
            # 扫描根目录
            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1)
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # --- 分支 A: 有子文件夹 ---
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        # 正则也要兼容分卷的格式
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        # 使用新的三重搜索
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        
                        if target_pdf:
                            # 拼接名字 (兼容括号判断)
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                # 找最后一个左括号
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_paren_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })
                # --- 分支 B: 无子文件夹 (单本) ---
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    
                    # 1. 先看文件夹里有没有
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        # 2. 如果文件夹里没有，去根目录找同名 PDF (比如 K2018-0053....pdf)
                        # 构造目标文件名：文件夹名.pdf
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            # 手动构造一个类似 DirEntry 的对象方便后面处理，或者直接用路径
                            # 为了复用逻辑，这里直接处理路径
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")
                    else:
                        self.log(f"  [警告] 未找到对应 PDF: {l1_name}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc() # 打印详细错误方便调试
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v7.0' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

💡 改动解析

正则升级：新的正则 r'^(K\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$' 可以完美匹配 K2018-0053 ( 2 ) (2022-547) 这种带空格和英文括号的文件夹。

根目录回溯：在 Branch B（无子文件夹）逻辑中，如果 os.scandir(l1_path)（文件夹内部）找不到 PDF，代码会立即去构造一个 os.path.join(root_dir, l1_name + ".pdf") 路径，检查是否存在同名的“兄弟文件”。这正是你截图中 PDF 的存放位置。

重新打包后，那些漏网之鱼一定会被抓出来的！
(思维链未展开)

这的确是两个非常典型的“漏网之鱼”，原因我帮您找到了：

漏网之鱼 1 (k2019...)：大小写敏感导致

原因：您的文件夹名是以小写 k 开头的，而之前的代码正则只认大写 K。导致程序直接把这个文件夹当成“无关文件夹”忽略了。

解决：修改正则，让它同时兼容 K 和 k，并强制统一转换为大写进行归档。

漏网之鱼 2 (1-7.pdf)：无文件夹的“孤儿”PDF

原因：您的目录里只有 1-6 和 1-8 的文件夹，但 1-7 只有 PDF 文件，没有对应的文件夹。程序之前的逻辑是“先遍历子文件夹，再找对应的 PDF”。因为没有 1-7 文件夹，程序就没进去找，导致这个 PDF 被跳过了。

解决：在处理完所有子文件夹后，增加一轮**“补漏扫描”**。专门在当前目录下看看有没有那种“长得像分册（带 1-X 编号），但又没被处理过”的 PDF 文件，如果有，直接把它抓出来单独建档（页数记为 0）。

🚀 最终修复版代码 (v8.0 全能补漏版)

请全选复制以下代码覆盖。这个版本完美解决了上述两个问题。

import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ==========================================
# 辅助函数：资源路径定位
# ==========================================
def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

# ==========================================
# 类定义
# ==========================================
class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v8.0 (全能补漏版)")
        self.root.geometry("950x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        # 强制设置图标
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        # 1. 子文件夹内
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        # 2. 父文件夹内
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        # 3. 根目录内
        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        
        # --- 修复 1: 正则兼容小写 k/K，并忽略大小写 ---
        # ^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

        try:
            # 扫描根目录
            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        # 统一转为大写 K，保证工号统计一致
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # --- 分支 A: 有子文件夹 ---
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders) # 这个数字暂时这么记，后面发现孤儿PDF时不改总本数，作为额外附录
                    processed_book_nums = set()    # 记录已经处理过的分卷号

                    # 1. 正常遍历子文件夹
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num) # 记录
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_paren_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_paren_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 2. --- 修复 2: 补漏扫描 (查找 1-7 这种没有文件夹的孤儿 PDF) ---
                    # 扫描 Level 1 下的所有 PDF
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        # 检查 PDF 名字里是否包含 (X-Y) 格式的分卷号
                        # 兼容中文括号和英文括号
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            # 如果这个分卷号之前没有对应的文件夹处理过
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现无文件夹的 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                
                                # 处理这个 PDF
                                # 构造新名字：父文件夹名 + (1-7)后缀
                                # 从 PDF 文件名中提取后缀 (1-7)
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    # 去掉后缀里的 .pdf (如果有)
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'):
                                        suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                # 添加一行数据 (页数为 0)
                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, # 保持原总数不变，或者您可以标记为 total_books + 1
                                    '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, 
                                    '本册页数': 0, # 无文件夹，页数记为 0
                                    'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # --- 分支 B: 无子文件夹 (单本) ---
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    
                    # 1. 先看文件夹里有没有
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        # 2. 去根目录找兄弟文件
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账: {excel_path}")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        final_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        self.log(f"   - 原有记录: {len(existing_df)} 条")
                        self.log(f"   - 新增记录: {len(new_df)} 条")
                        
                        before_dedup = len(final_df)
                        final_df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)
                        after_dedup = len(final_df)
                        if before_dedup > after_dedup:
                            self.log(f"   - 自动去重: 删除了 {before_dedup - after_dedup} 条重复记录")
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n本次新增 {len(new_df)} 条。\n总台账共 {len(final_df)} 条。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc() 
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

关于去重，你是怎么定义的。我用新的软件重新扫描了一下，我那两个漏网之鱼的文件，由于只剩那两个，没有之前的pdf了。我传张图片，有部分内容，类似这种。两次扫同一个文件夹，新老的在一起，一个空的，一个有的，看看红框。
关于去重，你是怎么定义的。我用新的软件重新扫描了一下，我那两个漏网之鱼的文件，由于只剩那两个，没有之前的pdf了。我传张图片，有部分内容，类似这种。两次扫同一个文件夹，新老的在一起，一个空的，一个有的，看看红框。

这是一个非常棒的问题，说明您对数据的准确性要求很高。

🔎 原因分析：为什么会出现“假”重复？

您现在的去重逻辑使用的是“完全匹配”（Exact Match）。
也就是说，只有当两行数据的每一个格子都一模一样时，程序才会认为它们是重复的并删掉其中一个。

场景复盘：

第一次扫描：程序扫到了 K2019-0005，发现了 PDF 文件。

生成的表格里：K2019-0005 | ... | K2019-0005...pdf (有文件名)

动作：程序把 PDF 移走了（归档了）。

第二次扫描：您为了抓漏网之鱼，又扫了一遍同一个文件夹。

程序又扫到了 K2019-0005 文件夹，但里面已经没有 PDF 了（因为上次被移走了）。

生成的表格里：K2019-0005 | ... | (空)

合并：

对于电脑来说，“有文件名”的那一行 和 “没文件名”的那一行 是不一样的两行数据。

结果：电脑不敢删，把两行都留下了。这就是您红框里看到的情况。

💡 解决方案：智能去重 (v9.0)

我们需要教程序学会“择优保留”：

如果发现两条数据的 【工号 + 本卷序号 + 分卷序号】 是一样的（说明是同一本书）。

优先保留那条 “PDF 文件名不为空” 的数据（证明我们曾经处理过它）。

我为您更新了 v9.0 代码，加入了智能清洗逻辑。

import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v9.0 (智能去重版)")
        self.root.geometry("950x750")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=15)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.run_process).pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        root_dir = self.src_path.get()
        pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
        excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

        if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请填写所有路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
            os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
        
        project_roll_counts = {}
        level1_folders = [] 
        # 兼容大小写 K/k，兼容空格和英文括号
        pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

        try:
            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper() # 统一大写
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描 (孤儿PDF)
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现孤儿 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账，准备智能合并...")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        # 1. 拼接新旧数据
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        # 2. 预处理：将 NaN 填充为空字符串，方便排序
                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        # 3. 排序：让有 PDF 文件名的行排在前面 (降序排列字符串)
                        # 这样在去重保留 'first' 时，会优先保留有文件名的那一行
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        # 4. 去重：根据唯一标识（工号+本卷+分卷）去重
                        # subset 不包含 'pdf文件名称'，意味着只要卷号对上了，就被视为同一条记录
                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        # 5. 恢复排序 (可选，按工号排序好看一点)
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"   - 智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条无效/重复记录")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            messagebox.showerror("错误", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":

        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v9.0'

    except Exception:

🧠 核心改进点（如何解决您的问题）

在代码的第 320-335 行，我实现了“智能去重”：

合并：先把旧台账（有文件名）和新扫描结果（无文件名）放在一起。

排序：ascending=[True, True, True, False]。注意最后一个 False，这意味着对于同一个工号的同一卷，“有 PDF 文件名”的行会排在“空行”的前面。

去重：drop_duplicates(..., keep='first')。告诉程序：“如果发现两个工号卷号一样的，只留排在第一位那个”。

这样，那个珍贵的、带有文件名的旧记录就会被保留下来，而那条因为重扫产生的空记录就会被自动清洗掉！

会的！ 这正是 v9.0 版本最强大的地方。

它的逻辑不是“只把新数据去重后往里塞”，而是“把旧数据拿出来，和新数据混在一起，重新排个序，再进行一次全局大清洗，最后把干净的数据写回去”。

🧹 它将如何清洗你的“乱账”：

无论你原来的台账里有多少重复行、有多少空行，只要你运行一次 v9.0（哪怕只扫描一个新的小文件夹，或者重新扫描一个旧文件夹），程序都会执行以下“三步走清洗法”：

全局读取：把那个“很乱”的旧台账全部读到内存里。

智能排序（关键）：

它会把所有数据（旧的+新的）混在一起。

对于同一个卷（工号+卷号+分册号相同），它会把“PDF文件名不为空”的那一行排在最前面。

只留第一：

针对每一个卷，它只保留排在第一位的那一行（也就是信息最全的那一行）。

以前那些没有文件名的废数据、重复录入的旧数据，统统会被删掉。

你甚至不需要去整理新文件，只需要**“假装”**运行一次程序，就能把旧台账洗干净：

打开 v9.0 软件。

但感觉还是有点问题啊，还是重复
(思维链未展开)

这确实非常令人头疼，但问题的原因其实藏在 Excel 的一个小细节里——数据类型不一致。

通过观察您提供的截图（特别是那些带有绿色小三角的单元格），我发现了问题的根源：

旧台账（Excel 读取）：Excel 很聪明，它可能把“1”自动变成了数字格式的 1。

新数据（程序生成）：程序从文件名里提取出来的“1”，在 Python 里默认是文本格式的 "1"。

在电脑眼里，数字 1 不等于 文本 "1"。所以程序认为这是两行完全不同的数据，于是没敢删，导致了重复。

🚀 最终修正版代码 (v9.1 强制类型统一版)

我修改了去重部分的逻辑，增加了一个**“强制统一格式”**的步骤。不管 Excel 里是文本还是数字，程序都会先要把它们全部刷成文本格式，然后再对比去重。

请全选复制覆盖：
