请全选复制覆盖（注意：需要 app.ico 图标文件在同级目录以获得最佳体验）：

Python
import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import threading
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

# ================= 配置常量 =================
COLOR_PRIMARY = "#1677ff"       # 专业蓝
COLOR_PRIMARY_HOVER = "#4096ff" # 悬停蓝
COLOR_PRIMARY_ACTIVE = "#0958d9"# 点击蓝
COLOR_BG = "#f5f7fa"            # 背景浅灰
COLOR_CARD_BG = "#ffffff"       # 卡片白
COLOR_TEXT_MAIN = "#303133"     # 主要文字
COLOR_TEXT_SUB = "#909399"      # 次要文字/提示
COLOR_BORDER = "#dcdfe6"        # 边框灰
COLOR_SUCCESS = "#67c23a"       # 成功绿
COLOR_WARNING = "#e6a23c"       # 警告橙
COLOR_ERROR = "#f56c6c"         # 错误红

FONT_TITLE = ("Microsoft YaHei", 18, "bold")
FONT_LABEL = ("Microsoft YaHei", 10)
FONT_ENTRY = ("Microsoft YaHei", 10)
FONT_BTN = ("Microsoft YaHei", 10)
FONT_BTN_LARGE = ("Microsoft YaHei", 12, "bold")
FONT_LOG = ("Consolas", 9)

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v11.0")
        self.root.geometry("900x850")
        self.root.configure(bg=COLOR_BG)
        
        # 设置图标
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        # 配置 ttk 样式
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        # 进度条样式
        self.style.configure("Horizontal.TProgressbar",
                             thickness=10, 
                             background=COLOR_PRIMARY,
                             troughcolor="#e0e0e0",
                             borderwidth=0, 
                             relief='flat')

        # 变量初始化
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        # 构建 UI
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # --- 1. 顶部标题 ---
        header_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(30, 20), padx=40)
        
        # 模拟现代线性图标 (用 Emoji 代替，或者可以用图片)
        tk.Label(header_frame, text="⚡", font=("Segoe UI Emoji", 24), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_PRIMARY).pack(side="left", padx=(0, 10))
        
        title_box = tk.Frame(header_frame, bg=COLOR_BG)
        title_box.pack(side="left")
        tk.Label(title_box, text="全流程自动化处理", font=FONT_TITLE, bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN, anchor="w").pack(anchor="w")
        tk.Label(title_box, text="数据提取 · 智能归档 · 台账生成", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_SUB, anchor="w").pack(anchor="w")

        # --- 2. 核心功能卡片区 ---
        # 使用 Frame 模拟卡片效果 (白色背景 + 细边框)
        card_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, padx=30, pady=30, 
                              highlightbackground=COLOR_BORDER, highlightthickness=1)
        card_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=40, pady=10)

        # 输入项 1: 源文件夹
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "1. 源文件夹 (包含 K2018...)", self.src_path, is_dir=True)
        self.create_spacer(card_frame, 24)
        
        # 输入项 2: 归档目标
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "2. 归档目标 (PDF 存放位置)", self.pdf_dst_path, is_dir=True)
        self.create_spacer(card_frame, 24)
        
        # 输入项 3: 总台账
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "3. 总台账路径 (Excel 文件)", self.excel_save_path, is_dir=False)

        # --- 3. 底部操作区 ---
        action_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        action_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=40, pady=30)

        # 进度条
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(action_frame, style="Horizontal.TProgressbar", orient="horizontal", mode='indeterminate')
        self.progress.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 20))

        # 执行按钮 (自定义 Hover 效果)
        self.btn_run = tk.Button(action_frame, text="✨ 执行全流程并写入台账", 
                                 font=FONT_BTN_LARGE,
                                 bg=COLOR_PRIMARY, fg="white",
                                 activebackground=COLOR_PRIMARY_ACTIVE, activeforeground="white",
                                 relief="flat", bd=0, cursor="hand2",
                                 command=self.start_thread)
        self.btn_run.pack(ipady=10, ipadx=40)
        
        # 绑定按钮 Hover 效果
        self.btn_run.bind("<Enter>", lambda e: self.btn_run.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY_HOVER))
        self.btn_run.bind("<Leave>", lambda e: self.btn_run.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY))

        # --- 4. 日志区域 ---
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=40, pady=(0, 30))

        log_header = tk.Label(log_frame, text="运行日志", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold"), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        log_header.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))

        # 日志框边框容器
        log_border = tk.Frame(log_frame, bg=COLOR_BORDER, padx=1, pady=1)
        log_border.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(log_border, height=8, font=FONT_LOG, 
                                     bg="#fafafa", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN,
                                     relief="flat", padx=10, pady=10)
        self.log_area.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        
        # 配置日志颜色标签
        self.log_area.tag_config("INFO", foreground=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        self.log_area.tag_config("WARNING", foreground=COLOR_WARNING)
        self.log_area.tag_config("ERROR", foreground=COLOR_ERROR)
        self.log_area.tag_config("SUCCESS", foreground=COLOR_SUCCESS)

    def create_input_group(self, parent, label_text, var, is_dir):
        """创建统一风格的输入组"""
        container = tk.Frame(parent, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG)
        container.pack(fill="x")

        # 标签
        tk.Label(container, text=label_text, font=FONT_LABEL, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN).pack(anchor="w", mb=8)

        # 输入框和按钮的容器 (用于水平布局)
        input_box = tk.Frame(container, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG)
        input_box.pack(fill="x")

        # 输入框 (自定义边框颜色和 Focus 效果)
        # 用一个 Frame 包裹 Entry 来模拟边框
        border_frame = tk.Frame(input_box, bg=COLOR_BORDER, padx=1, pady=1)
        border_frame.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True)

        entry = tk.Entry(border_frame, textvariable=var, font=FONT_ENTRY, relief="flat", bg="white", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        entry.pack(fill="both", expand=True, ipady=6, padx=8) # 增加高度和内边距

        # 输入框 Focus 动效
        def on_focus_in(e): border_frame.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY)
        def on_focus_out(e): border_frame.config(bg=COLOR_BORDER)
        entry.bind("<FocusIn>", on_focus_in)
        entry.bind("<FocusOut>", on_focus_out)

        # 浏览按钮
        cmd = lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()) if is_dir else lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")]))
        
        btn = tk.Button(input_box, text="浏览", font=FONT_BTN, 
                        bg="white", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN, 
                        relief="solid", bd=1, cursor="hand2",
                        command=cmd)
        # 这里的 relief="solid" 配合 bd=1 实现了细边框按钮
        # 由于 tk.Button 的边框颜色很难直接改，我们用默认的灰色边框，也符合设计
        btn.pack(side="right", padx=(10, 0), ipadx=15, ipady=2)

    def create_spacer(self, parent, height):
        tk.Frame(parent, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, height=height).pack()

    # --- 日志系统 ---
    def log(self, msg, level="INFO"):
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg, level))

    def _update_log(self, msg, level):
        # 自动识别级别
        if "错误" in msg or "失败" in msg: level = "ERROR"
        elif "警告" in msg or "跳过" in msg or "未找到" in msg: level = "WARNING"
        elif "成功" in msg or "完成" in msg: level = "SUCCESS"
        
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, f"[{level}] {msg}\n", level)
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    # --- 线程与流程控制 ---
    def start_thread(self):
        # 简单校验
        if not all([self.src_path.get(), self.pdf_dst_path.get(), self.excel_save_path.get()]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先选择所有路径！")
            return

        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="⏳ 正在全力处理中...", bg="#a0cfff", cursor="wait")
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="✨ 执行全流程并写入台账", bg=COLOR_PRIMARY, cursor="hand2")
        
        if success:
            self.log("-" * 30)
            self.log(message, "SUCCESS")
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            self.log(message, "ERROR")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # ================= 业务逻辑保持核心不变 =================
    # (以下逻辑直接复用之前的 v10.0，仅修改 log 调用适配新参数)
    
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 
        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0
        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 
            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None
        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)
        new_parts = []
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])
        return '、'.join(new_parts)

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动: 正在扫描 {root_dir} ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"归档: {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"补漏: 发现孤儿 PDF {orphan_pdf.name}", "WARNING")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"归档(孤儿): {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"归档: {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"发现已有台账，准备智能合并...", "INFO")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录", "SUCCESS")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"读取旧台账失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"新建台账文件: {excel_path}", "INFO")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("未找到有效数据，未更新台账。", "WARNING")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"发生未知错误: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v11.0' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

    def create_spacer(self, parent, height):
        tk.Frame(parent, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, height=height).pack()

    # --- 日志系统 ---
    def log(self, msg, level="INFO"):
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg, level))

    def _update_log(self, msg, level):
        if "错误" in msg or "失败" in msg: level = "ERROR"
        elif "警告" in msg or "跳过" in msg or "未找到" in msg: level = "WARNING"
        elif "成功" in msg or "完成" in msg: level = "SUCCESS"
        
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, f"[{level}] {msg}\n", level)
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    # --- 线程与流程控制 ---
    def start_thread(self):
        if not all([self.src_path.get(), self.pdf_dst_path.get(), self.excel_save_path.get()]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先选择所有路径！")
            return

        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="⏳ 正在全力处理中...", bg="#a0cfff", cursor="wait")
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="✨ 执行全流程并写入台账", bg=COLOR_PRIMARY, cursor="hand2")
        
        if success:
            self.log("-" * 30)
            self.log(message, "SUCCESS")
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            self.log(message, "ERROR")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # ================= 业务逻辑 =================
    
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 
        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0
        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 
            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None
        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)
        new_parts = []
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])
        return '、'.join(new_parts)

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动: 正在扫描 {root_dir} ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"归档: {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"补漏: 发现孤儿 PDF {orphan_pdf.name}", "WARNING")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"归档(孤儿): {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"归档: {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"发现已有台账，准备智能合并...", "INFO")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录", "SUCCESS")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"读取旧台账失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"新建台账文件: {excel_path}", "INFO")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("未找到有效数据，未更新台账。", "WARNING")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"发生未知错误: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

新出了一个bug，点击"3. 总台账路径 (Excel 文件)"的浏览按钮没有了反应，选不了了，是什么原因

您真是火眼金睛！这确实是一个极其隐蔽的逻辑 Bug。

🐛 Bug 原因深度解析：
在上一版代码中，我为了追求代码简洁，把按钮的点击事件写成了一行：
cmd = lambda: A() if is_dir else lambda: B()

这行代码在 Python 里的实际运行逻辑变成了：

如果是文件夹：点击按钮 -> 执行 A() -> 正常弹出。

如果是文件（你的情况）：点击按钮 -> 返回了一个函数 lambda: B() -> 并没有执行这个函数 -> 界面毫无反应。

简单说，就是对于第三个按钮，程序只是把“打开文件框”这个动作拿在手里看了看，并没有真的去“做”这个动作。

🚀 修复版代码 (v11.2 按钮逻辑修复版)

我将那行“聪明反被聪明误”的代码拆解成了标准的 if-else 判断，确保点击按钮时立即执行对应的操作。

请全选复制覆盖：

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v11.2")

        # 设置图标
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        # 配置 ttk 样式
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        # 进度条样式
        self.style.configure("Horizontal.TProgressbar",
                             thickness=10, 
                             background=COLOR_PRIMARY,
                             troughcolor="#e0e0e0",
                             borderwidth=0, 
                             relief='flat')

        # 变量初始化
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        # 构建 UI
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # --- 1. 顶部标题 ---
        header_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(30, 20), padx=40)
        
        tk.Label(header_frame, text="⚡", font=("Segoe UI Emoji", 24), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_PRIMARY).pack(side="left", padx=(0, 10))
        
        title_box = tk.Frame(header_frame, bg=COLOR_BG)
        title_box.pack(side="left")
        tk.Label(title_box, text="全流程自动化处理", font=FONT_TITLE, bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN, anchor="w").pack(anchor="w")
        tk.Label(title_box, text="数据提取 · 智能归档 · 台账生成", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_SUB, anchor="w").pack(anchor="w")

        # --- 2. 核心功能卡片区 ---
        card_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, padx=30, pady=30, 
                              highlightbackground=COLOR_BORDER, highlightthickness=1)
        card_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=40, pady=10)

        # 输入项 1: 源文件夹
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "1. 源文件夹 (包含 K2018...)", self.src_path, is_dir=True)
        self.create_spacer(card_frame, 24)
        
        # 输入项 2: 归档目标
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "2. 归档目标 (PDF 存放位置)", self.pdf_dst_path, is_dir=True)
        self.create_spacer(card_frame, 24)
        
        # 输入项 3: 总台账
        self.create_input_group(card_frame, "3. 总台账路径 (Excel 文件)", self.excel_save_path, is_dir=False)

        # --- 3. 底部操作区 ---
        action_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        action_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=40, pady=30)

        # 进度条
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(action_frame, style="Horizontal.TProgressbar", orient="horizontal", mode='indeterminate')
        self.progress.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 20))

        # 执行按钮
        self.btn_run = tk.Button(action_frame, text="✨ 执行全流程并写入台账", 
                                 font=FONT_BTN_LARGE,
                                 bg=COLOR_PRIMARY, fg="white",
                                 activebackground=COLOR_PRIMARY_ACTIVE, activeforeground="white",
                                 relief="flat", bd=0, cursor="hand2",
                                 command=self.start_thread)
        self.btn_run.pack(ipady=10, ipadx=40)
        
        self.btn_run.bind("<Enter>", lambda e: self.btn_run.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY_HOVER))
        self.btn_run.bind("<Leave>", lambda e: self.btn_run.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY))

        # --- 4. 日志区域 ---
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=COLOR_BG)
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=40, pady=(0, 30))

        log_header = tk.Label(log_frame, text="运行日志", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold"), bg=COLOR_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        log_header.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))

        log_border = tk.Frame(log_frame, bg=COLOR_BORDER, padx=1, pady=1)
        log_border.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(log_border, height=8, font=FONT_LOG, 
                                     bg="#fafafa", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN,
                                     relief="flat", padx=10, pady=10)
        self.log_area.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        
        self.log_area.tag_config("INFO", foreground=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        self.log_area.tag_config("WARNING", foreground=COLOR_WARNING)
        self.log_area.tag_config("ERROR", foreground=COLOR_ERROR)
        self.log_area.tag_config("SUCCESS", foreground=COLOR_SUCCESS)

    def create_input_group(self, parent, label_text, var, is_dir):
        """创建统一风格的输入组"""
        container = tk.Frame(parent, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG)
        container.pack(fill="x")

        tk.Label(container, text=label_text, font=FONT_LABEL, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))

        input_box = tk.Frame(container, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG)
        input_box.pack(fill="x")

        border_frame = tk.Frame(input_box, bg=COLOR_BORDER, padx=1, pady=1)
        border_frame.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True)

        entry = tk.Entry(border_frame, textvariable=var, font=FONT_ENTRY, relief="flat", bg="white", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN)
        entry.pack(fill="both", expand=True, ipady=6, padx=8)

        def on_focus_in(e): border_frame.config(bg=COLOR_PRIMARY)
        def on_focus_out(e): border_frame.config(bg=COLOR_BORDER)
        entry.bind("<FocusIn>", on_focus_in)
        entry.bind("<FocusOut>", on_focus_out)

        # --- 核心修复：明确区分命令逻辑，修复浏览按钮失效问题 ---
        if is_dir:
            # 选择文件夹
            cmd = lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory())
        else:
            # 选择/保存文件
            cmd = lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")]))
        # ----------------------------------------------------
        
        btn = tk.Button(input_box, text="浏览", font=FONT_BTN, 
                        bg="white", fg=COLOR_TEXT_MAIN, 
                        relief="solid", bd=1, cursor="hand2",
                        command=cmd)
        btn.pack(side="right", padx=(10, 0), ipadx=15, ipady=2)

    def create_spacer(self, parent, height):
        tk.Frame(parent, bg=COLOR_CARD_BG, height=height).pack()

    # --- 日志系统 ---
    def log(self, msg, level="INFO"):
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg, level))

    def _update_log(self, msg, level):
        if "错误" in msg or "失败" in msg: level = "ERROR"
        elif "警告" in msg or "跳过" in msg or "未找到" in msg: level = "WARNING"
        elif "成功" in msg or "完成" in msg: level = "SUCCESS"
        
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, f"[{level}] {msg}\n", level)
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    # --- 线程与流程控制 ---
    def start_thread(self):
        if not all([self.src_path.get(), self.pdf_dst_path.get(), self.excel_save_path.get()]):
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先选择所有路径！")
            return

        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="⏳ 正在全力处理中...", bg="#a0cfff", cursor="wait")
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="✨ 执行全流程并写入台账", bg=COLOR_PRIMARY, cursor="hand2")
        
        if success:
            self.log("-" * 30)
            self.log(message, "SUCCESS")
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            self.log(message, "ERROR")
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # ================= 业务逻辑 =================
    
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 
        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0
        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 
            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None
        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)
        new_parts = []
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])
        return '、'.join(new_parts)

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动: 正在扫描 {root_dir} ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"归档: {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"补漏: 发现孤儿 PDF {orphan_pdf.name}", "WARNING")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    self.log(f"归档(孤儿): {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"归档: {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"发现已有台账，准备智能合并...", "INFO")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录", "SUCCESS")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"读取旧台账失败: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"新建台账文件: {excel_path}", "INFO")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("未找到有效数据，未更新台账。", "WARNING")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"发生未知错误: {str(e)}", "ERROR")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v11.2' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

Pythonimport os
import shutil

# ================= 配置区域 =================
# 1. 你存放那些 K2017... 文件夹的根目录路径
source_root = r'C:\你的数据目录' 
# 2. 最终存放所有 PDF 的目标文件夹
target_dir = r'C:\所有PDF汇总'
# ===========================================

if not os.path.exists(target_dir):
    os.makedirs(target_dir)

def process_pdfs():
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(source_root):
        # 跳过目标文件夹本身，防止死循环
        if os.path.abspath(root) == os.path.abspath(target_dir):
            continue
            
        for file in files:
            if file.lower().endswith('.pdf'):
                current_file_path = os.path.join(root, file)
                parent_folder_name = os.path.basename(root)
                
                # 获取不带后缀的文件名
                file_name_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file)[0]
                
                # 逻辑：如果 PDF 在子文件夹里 (即 parent_folder_name 不是 source_root)
                if os.path.abspath(root) != os.path.abspath(source_root):
                    # 按照你的要求拼接：父文件夹名 + PDF 里的编号部分
                    # 这里假设你想保留 PDF 名字中从 "（" 开始的部分，或者直接拼接
                    # 根据你的例子：Parent + (1-1)
                    if "（" in file_name_no_ext:
                        suffix = file_name_no_ext[file_name_no_ext.find("（"):]
                        new_name = f"{parent_folder_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                    else:
                        new_name = f"{parent_folder_name}_{file}"
                else:
                    # 如果就在根目录，不改名
                    new_name = file
                
                target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, new_name)
                
                # 执行移动（如果目标已存在，会覆盖，如需重名检查可加逻辑）
                print(f"正在处理: {file} -> {new_name}")
                shutil.move(current_file_path, target_path)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    process_pdfs()
    print("\n✅ 处理完成！所有 PDF 已移至目标文件夹。")

Pythonimport os
import shutil
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, scrolledtext

def process_logic(source_root, target_dir, log_widget):
    """核心处理逻辑"""
    if not source_root or not target_dir:
        messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先选择源文件夹和输出文件夹！")
        return

    if not os.path.exists(target_dir):
        os.makedirs(target_dir)

    count = 0
    # 遍历目录结构 
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(source_root):
        # 防止处理到目标文件夹内部
        if os.path.abspath(root) == os.path.abspath(target_dir):
            continue
            
        for file in files:
            if file.lower().endswith('.pdf'):
                current_path = os.path.join(root, file)
                parent_name = os.path.basename(root)
                file_name_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file)[0]

                # 判断逻辑：如果 PDF 在子文件夹内（非根目录直接存放）
                # 例如：父文件夹 K2017-0002（1）（2017-023）下的 K2017-0002（1-1）.pdf 
                if os.path.abspath(root) != os.path.abspath(source_root):
                    # 提取编号部分，例如从 "K2017-0002（1-1）" 中提取 "（1-1）" 
                    if "（" in file_name_no_ext:
                        # 找到第一个左括号的位置，截取后面所有内容
                        suffix = file_name_no_ext[file_name_no_ext.find("（"):]
                        new_name = f"{parent_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                    else:
                        new_name = f"{parent_name}_{file}"
                else:
                    # 根目录下的 PDF 保持原名，如 K2013-0164（2）（2022-067）.pdf 
                    new_name = file

                target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, new_name)
                
                try:
                    shutil.move(current_path, target_path)
                    log_widget.insert(tk.END, f"成功: {file} -> {new_name}\n")
                    count += 1
                except Exception as e:
                    log_widget.insert(tk.END, f"失败: {file}, 错误: {str(e)}\n")
                
                log_widget.see(tk.END)
                log_widget.update_idletasks()

    messagebox.showinfo("完成", f"处理完毕！共移动了 {count} 个文件。")

# --- GUI 界面部分 ---
def start_gui():
    root = tk.Tk()
    root.title("PDF 自动化重命名归档工具")
    root.geometry("600x450")

    # 变量存储路径
    src_path = tk.StringVar()
    dst_path = tk.StringVar()

    # 界面布局
    tk.Label(root, text="1. 选择包含文件夹的根目录 (源):").pack(pady=5)
    frame1 = tk.Frame(root)
    frame1.pack()
    tk.Entry(frame1, textvariable=src_path, width=50).pack(side=tk.Left, padx=5)
    tk.Button(frame1, text="浏览", command=lambda: src_path.set(filedialog.askdirectory())).pack(side=tk.Left)

    tk.Label(root, text="2. 选择 PDF 汇总到的目录 (目标):").pack(pady=5)
    frame2 = tk.Frame(root)
    frame2.pack()
    tk.Entry(frame2, textvariable=dst_path, width=50).pack(side=tk.Left, padx=5)
    tk.Button(frame2, text="浏览", command=lambda: dst_path.set(filedialog.askdirectory())).pack(side=tk.Left)

    tk.Button(root, text="开始批量处理", bg="#4CAF50", fg="white", font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
              command=lambda: process_logic(src_path.get(), dst_path.get(), log_area)).pack(pady=20)

    tk.Label(root, text="运行日志:").pack()
    log_area = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(root, width=70, height=10)
    log_area.pack(padx=10, pady=5)

    root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_gui()

Pythonimport os
import shutil
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

class ModernPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能重命名归档助手 v2.0")
        self.root.geometry("700x550")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f5f7fa")
        
        # 设置样式
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        self.style.configure("TButton", padding=6, font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10))
        self.style.configure("Action.TButton", background="#0078d4", foreground="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 11, "bold"))
        self.style.configure("Header.TLabel", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 18, "bold"), background="#f5f7fa", foreground="#333")

        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 顶部标题
        header = ttk.Label(self.root, text="PDF 自动化处理工具", style="Header.TLabel")
        header.pack(pady=25)

        # 主卡片容器
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20, highlightthickness=1, highlightbackground="#e0e0e0")
        main_frame.pack(padx=30, fill="x")

        # 源路径
        tk.Label(main_frame, text="待处理的源文件夹:", bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10)).grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="w")
        ttk.Entry(main_frame, textvariable=self.src_path, width=60).grid(row=1, column=0, pady=(5, 15))
        ttk.Button(main_frame, text="选择路径", command=lambda: self.select_dir(self.src_path)).grid(row=1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 15))

        # 目标路径
        tk.Label(main_frame, text="整理后的输出文件夹:", bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10)).grid(row=2, column=0, sticky="w")
        ttk.Entry(main_frame, textvariable=self.dst_path, width=60).grid(row=3, column=0, pady=5)
        ttk.Button(main_frame, text="选择路径", command=lambda: self.select_dir(self.dst_path)).grid(row=3, column=1, padx=10, pady=5)

        # 执行按钮
        self.btn_run = ttk.Button(self.root, text="🚀 立即开始批量重命名与归档", style="Action.TButton", command=self.run_process)
        self.btn_run.pack(pady=25)

        # 日志区域
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f5f7fa")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=(0, 20))
        tk.Label(log_frame, text="运行状态日志:", bg="#f5f7fa", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9, "italic")).pack(anchor="w")
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(log_frame, height=10, font=("Consolas", 9), bg="#ffffff", borderwidth=0)
        self.log_area.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    def select_dir(self, var):
        path = filedialog.askdirectory()
        if path:
            var.set(path)

    def log(self, message):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, message + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def run_process(self):
        src = self.src_path.get()
        dst = self.dst_path.get()

        if not src or not dst:
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先完整选择源路径和目标路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(dst):
            os.makedirs(dst)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动: {src} ---")
        count = 0
        
        # 获取根目录的绝对路径，用于判断
        abs_src = os.path.abspath(src)

        for root, dirs, files in os.walk(src):
            # 排除目标文件夹，防止死循环
            if os.path.abspath(root) == os.path.abspath(dst):
                continue
                
            for file in files:
                if file.lower().endswith('.pdf'):
                    old_path = os.path.join(root, file)
                    parent_name = os.path.basename(root)
                    file_name_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file)[0]

                    # 核心改名逻辑
                    # 如果 PDF 位于子文件夹中
                    if os.path.abspath(root) != abs_src:
                        if "（" in file_name_no_ext:
                            # 提取最后一个括号及内容，如 "（1-1）"
                            suffix = file_name_no_ext[file_name_no_ext.rfind("（"):]
                            new_name = f"{parent_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                        else:
                            new_name = f"{parent_name}_{file}"
                    else:
                        # 已经在根目录的文件不改名
                        new_name = file

                    new_path = os.path.join(dst, new_name)

                    try:
                        shutil.move(old_path, new_path)
                        self.log(f"[成功] 移至 -> {new_name}")
                        count += 1
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"[失败] {file}: {str(e)}")

        self.log(f"\n✨ 任务完成！共处理 {count} 个文件。")
        messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n共移动并重命名了 {count} 个文件。")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = ModernPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

        ttk.Button(main_frame, text="选择路径", command=lambda: self.select_dir(self.src_path)).grid(row=1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 15))

        # 目标路径
        tk.Label(main_frame, text="整理后的输出文件夹:", bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10)).grid(row=2, column=0, sticky="w")
        ttk.Entry(main_frame, textvariable=self.dst_path, width=60).grid(row=3, column=0, pady=5)
        ttk.Button(main_frame, text="选择路径", command=lambda: self.select_dir(self.dst_path)).grid(row=3, column=1, padx=10, pady=5)

        # 执行按钮
        self.btn_run = ttk.Button(self.root, text="🚀 立即开始批量重命名与归档", style="Action.TButton", command=self.run_process)
        self.btn_run.pack(pady=25)

        # 日志区域
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f5f7fa")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=(0, 20))
        tk.Label(log_frame, text="运行状态日志:", bg="#f5f7fa", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9, "italic")).pack(anchor="w")
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(log_frame, height=10, font=("Consolas", 9), bg="#ffffff", borderwidth=0)
        self.log_area.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    def select_dir(self, var):
        path = filedialog.askdirectory()
        if path:
            var.set(path)

    def log(self, message):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, message + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)
        self.root.update_idletasks()

    def run_process(self):
        src = self.src_path.get()
        dst = self.dst_path.get()

        if not src or not dst:
            messagebox.showwarning("提示", "请先完整选择源路径和目标路径！")
            return

        if not os.path.exists(dst):
            os.makedirs(dst)

        self.log(f"--- 任务启动: {src} ---")
        count = 0
        
        # 获取根目录的绝对路径，用于判断
        abs_src = os.path.abspath(src)

        for root, dirs, files in os.walk(src):
            # 排除目标文件夹，防止死循环
            if os.path.abspath(root) == os.path.abspath(dst):
                continue
                
            for file in files:
                if file.lower().endswith('.pdf'):
                    old_path = os.path.join(root, file)
                    parent_name = os.path.basename(root)
                    file_name_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file)[0]

                    # 核心改名逻辑
                    # 如果 PDF 位于子文件夹中
                    if os.path.abspath(root) != abs_src:
                        if "（" in file_name_no_ext:
                            # 提取最后一个括号及内容，如 "（1-1）"
                            suffix = file_name_no_ext[file_name_no_ext.rfind("（"):]
                            new_name = f"{parent_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                        else:
                            new_name = f"{parent_name}_{file}"
                    else:
                        # 已经在根目录的文件不改名
                        new_name = file

                    new_path = os.path.join(dst, new_name)

                    try:
                        shutil.move(old_path, new_path)
                        self.log(f"[成功] 移至 -> {new_name}")
                        count += 1
                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"[失败] {file}: {str(e)}")

        self.log(f"\n✨ 任务完成！共处理 {count} 个文件。")
        messagebox.showinfo("成功", f"处理完成！\n共移动并重命名了 {count} 个文件。")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = ModernPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()
