                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现孤儿 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账，准备智能合并...")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"   - 智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v10.0' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import threading  # 新增：多线程支持
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v10.0 (防卡死丝滑版)")
        self.root.geometry("950x800") #稍微加高一点放进度条
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam')
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        tk.Label(self.root, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(pady=15)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=20, pady=20)
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 按钮区域
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        btn_frame.pack(pady=10)
        
        # --- 新增：进度条 ---
        # mode='indeterminate' 表示左右来回滚动，适合不确定具体时间的长任务
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(self.root, orient="horizontal", length=800, mode='indeterminate')
        self.progress.pack(pady=(0, 10))
        
        self.btn_run = ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", command=self.start_thread)
        self.btn_run.pack(ipadx=10, ipady=5)

        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=15, font=("Consolas", 9))
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold")).grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(5,0))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=80)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(5, 10), ipady=3)
        if is_file:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="选择/新建...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])))
        else:
            btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory()))
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(5, 10))

    # --- 线程安全日志 ---
    def log(self, msg):
        # 使用 root.after 确保在主线程更新 UI，防止崩溃
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg))

    def _update_log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    # --- 线程管理 ---
    def start_thread(self):
        # 1. 禁用按钮，防止重复点击
        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="正在处理中，请稍候...")
        # 2. 启动进度条
        self.progress.start(10) # 10ms 滚动一次
        # 3. 启动后台线程
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        # 停止进度条，恢复按钮
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账")
        
        if success:
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # --- 业务逻辑 ---
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            # 在后台线程中获取StringVar的值是不安全的，最好在开始前获取，或者用root.after
            # 但StringVar.get()通常在读取时是线程安全的。
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "请填写所有路径！"))
                return

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现孤儿 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账，准备智能合并...")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"   - 智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v10.0' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

Pythonimport os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import threading
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v10.1 (UI美化版)")
        self.root.geometry("950x800")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        # --- 核心修改：UI 风格美化 ---
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam') # clam 主题支持自定义颜色
        
        # 1. 美化输入框和按钮
        self.style.configure("TEntry", fieldbackground="white", borderwidth=1)
        self.style.configure("TButton", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9), padding=5)
        
        # 2. 美化进度条 (重点修改)
        # thickness: 厚度, background: 滚动条颜色, troughcolor: 轨道颜色
        self.style.configure("Horizontal.TProgressbar",
                             thickness=20,          # 变厚，更有质感
                             background="#0078d4",  # 科技蓝 (原本是原谅绿)
                             troughcolor="#e0e0e0", # 浅灰底槽
                             borderwidth=0,         # 去掉边框
                             relief='flat')         # 扁平化效果
        # ---------------------------
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 标题美化
        title_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        title_frame.pack(pady=20)
        tk.Label(title_frame, text="📄", font=("Segoe UI Emoji", 24), bg="#f0f2f5").pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        tk.Label(title_frame, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=30, pady=30, relief="flat")
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 底部操作区
        action_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        action_frame.pack(pady=20, fill="x", padx=20)
        
        # 进度条放在按钮上方
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(action_frame, style="Horizontal.TProgressbar", orient="horizontal", length=800, mode='indeterminate')
        self.progress.pack(pady=(0, 15))
        
        # 按钮加大加粗
        self.btn_run = tk.Button(action_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", 
                                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 12, "bold"), 
                                 bg="#0078d4", fg="white", # 按钮蓝底白字
                                 activebackground="#005a9e", activeforeground="white",
                                 relief="flat", cursor="hand2",
                                 command=self.start_thread)
        self.btn_run.pack(ipadx=20, ipady=8)

        # 日志区美化
        log_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="运行日志:", bg="#f0f2f5", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9, "bold"), fg="#666")
        log_label.pack(anchor="w", padx=20, pady=(10, 5))
        
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=12, font=("Consolas", 9), 
                                     bg="white", fg="#333", 
                                     relief="flat", padx=10, pady=10) # 增加内边距
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold"), fg="#333").grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(10,5))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=85)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(0, 10), ipady=5) # 增加输入框高度
        
        cmd = lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])) if is_file else lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory())
        
        btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=cmd)
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(0, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg))

    def _update_log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    def start_thread(self):
        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="⏳ 正在全力处理中...", bg="#cccccc")
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", bg="#0078d4")
        
        if success:
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # --- 业务逻辑保持不变 ---
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "请填写所有路径！"))
                return

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现孤儿 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账，准备智能合并...")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"   - 智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v10.1' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()

import os
import shutil
import re
import sys
import ctypes
import threading
import pandas as pd
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox, ttk
from tkinter.scrolledtext import ScrolledText

def resource_path(relative_path):
    try:
        base_path = sys._MEIPASS
    except Exception:
        base_path = os.path.abspath(".")
    return os.path.join(base_path, relative_path)

class UnifiedPDFTool:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("PDF 智能归档 & 台账累积录入系统 v10.1 (UI美化版)")
        self.root.geometry("950x800")
        self.root.configure(bg="#f0f2f5")
        
        icon_path = resource_path("app.ico")
        if os.path.exists(icon_path):
            try:
                self.root.iconbitmap(icon_path)
                self.root.iconbitmap(default=icon_path)
            except Exception:
                pass

        # --- 核心修改：UI 风格美化 ---
        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use('clam') # clam 主题支持自定义颜色
        
        # 1. 美化输入框和按钮
        self.style.configure("TEntry", fieldbackground="white", borderwidth=1)
        self.style.configure("TButton", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9), padding=5)
        
        # 2. 美化进度条 (重点修改)
        # thickness: 厚度, background: 滚动条颜色, troughcolor: 轨道颜色
        self.style.configure("Horizontal.TProgressbar",
                             thickness=20,          # 变厚，更有质感
                             background="#0078d4",  # 科技蓝 (原本是原谅绿)
                             troughcolor="#e0e0e0", # 浅灰底槽
                             borderwidth=0,         # 去掉边框
                             relief='flat')         # 扁平化效果
        # ---------------------------
        
        self.src_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.pdf_dst_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.excel_save_path = tk.StringVar()
        
        self.setup_ui()

    def setup_ui(self):
        # 标题美化
        title_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        title_frame.pack(pady=20)
        tk.Label(title_frame, text="📄", font=("Segoe UI Emoji", 24), bg="#f0f2f5").pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        tk.Label(title_frame, text="全流程处理：数据提取 -> 文件重命名归档 -> 累积写入台账", 
                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 14, "bold"), bg="#f0f2f5", fg="#333").pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        
        main_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="white", padx=30, pady=30, relief="flat")
        main_frame.pack(padx=20, fill="x")

        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "1. 本次要处理的源文件夹 (包含 K2018...):", self.src_path, 0, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "2. PDF 归档目标文件夹:", self.pdf_dst_path, 3, is_file=False)
        self.create_path_selector(main_frame, "3. 总台账文件路径 (会自动累加数据):", self.excel_save_path, 6, is_file=True)

        # 底部操作区
        action_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#f0f2f5")
        action_frame.pack(pady=20, fill="x", padx=20)
        
        # 进度条放在按钮上方
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(action_frame, style="Horizontal.TProgressbar", orient="horizontal", length=800, mode='indeterminate')
        self.progress.pack(pady=(0, 15))
        
        # 按钮加大加粗
        self.btn_run = tk.Button(action_frame, text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", 
                                 font=("Microsoft YaHei", 12, "bold"), 
                                 bg="#0078d4", fg="white", # 按钮蓝底白字
                                 activebackground="#005a9e", activeforeground="white",
                                 relief="flat", cursor="hand2",
                                 command=self.start_thread)
        self.btn_run.pack(ipadx=20, ipady=8)

        # 日志区美化
        log_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="运行日志:", bg="#f0f2f5", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 9, "bold"), fg="#666")
        log_label.pack(anchor="w", padx=20, pady=(10, 5))
        
        self.log_area = ScrolledText(self.root, height=12, font=("Consolas", 9), 
                                     bg="white", fg="#333", 
                                     relief="flat", padx=10, pady=10) # 增加内边距
        self.log_area.pack(padx=20, pady=(0, 20), fill="both", expand=True)

    def create_path_selector(self, parent, label, var, row, is_file):
        tk.Label(parent, text=label, bg="white", font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10, "bold"), fg="#333").grid(row=row, column=0, sticky="w", pady=(10,5))
        entry = ttk.Entry(parent, textvariable=var, width=85)
        entry.grid(row=row+1, column=0, pady=(0, 10), ipady=5) # 增加输入框高度
        
        cmd = lambda: var.set(filedialog.asksaveasfilename(defaultextension=".xlsx", filetypes=[("Excel Files", "*.xlsx")])) if is_file else lambda: var.set(filedialog.askdirectory())
        
        btn = ttk.Button(parent, text="浏览...", command=cmd)
        btn.grid(row=row+1, column=1, padx=10, pady=(0, 10))

    def log(self, msg):
        self.root.after(0, lambda: self._update_log(msg))

    def _update_log(self, msg):
        self.log_area.insert(tk.END, msg + "\n")
        self.log_area.see(tk.END)

    def start_thread(self):
        self.btn_run.config(state="disabled", text="⏳ 正在全力处理中...", bg="#cccccc")
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self.run_process, daemon=True).start()

    def finish_process(self, success, message):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.btn_run.config(state="normal", text="🚀 执行全流程并写入台账", bg="#0078d4")
        
        if success:
            messagebox.showinfo("成功", message)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("错误", message)

    # --- 业务逻辑保持不变 ---
    def expand_survey_numbers(self, text):
        if not text: return ""
        text = re.sub(r'[、\s]+', ',', text)
        items = [x.strip() for x in text.split(',') if x.strip()]
        result = []
        last_year = ""
        for item in items:
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-')
                if len(parts) >= 2 and len(parts[0]) == 4:
                    last_year = parts[0]
                    result.append(item)
                else:
                    result.append(item)
            else:
                if last_year:
                    result.append(f"{last_year}-{item}")
                else:
                    result.append(item)
        return ",".join(result)

    def process_content_string(self, content):
        items = re.split(r'[、,，\.\s]+', content)
        items = [i for i in items if i.strip()]
        if len(items) < 4: return None 

        parsed_items = []
        last_year = ""
        valid_count = 0

        for item in items:
            item = item.strip()
            if '-' in item:
                parts = item.split('-', 1)
                if len(parts) == 2 and parts[0].strip().isdigit() and len(parts[0].strip()) == 4:
                    current_year = parts[0].strip()
                    num_str = parts[1].strip()
                else:
                    current_year = last_year
                    num_str = item
            else:
                current_year = last_year
                num_str = item
            
            try:
                clean_num_str = re.sub(r'\D', '', num_str)
                if not clean_num_str: num_val = -999
                else:
                    num_val = int(clean_num_str)
                    valid_count += 1
                    if '-' in item: last_year = current_year
            except ValueError: num_val = -999 

            parsed_items.append({'original': item, 'year': current_year, 'num_str': num_str, 'num_val': num_val})
            
        if valid_count < len(items) * 0.5: return None

        groups = []
        current_group = [parsed_items[0]]
        for i in range(1, len(parsed_items)):
            prev = parsed_items[i-1]
            curr = parsed_items[i]
            is_consecutive = (curr['year'] == prev['year']) and (curr['num_val'] != -999) and \
                             (prev['num_val'] != -999) and (curr['num_val'] == prev['num_val'] + 1)
            if is_consecutive: current_group.append(curr)
            else:
                groups.append(current_group)
                current_group = [curr]
        groups.append(current_group)

        new_parts = []
        is_shortened = False
        for group in groups:
            if len(group) > 3:  
                start_item = group[0]['original']
                end_item_num = group[-1]['num_str']
                new_parts.append(f"{start_item}~{end_item_num}")
                is_shortened = True
            else:
                for item in group: new_parts.append(item['original'])

        return '、'.join(new_parts) if is_shortened else None

    def shorten_filename_logic(self, filename):
        pattern = re.compile(r'([（\(])\s*([^（）\(\)]+)\s*([）\)])')
        matches = list(pattern.finditer(filename))
        if not matches: return filename
        matches.reverse()
        new_filename = filename
        for match in matches:
            prefix_paren = match.group(1)
            content = match.group(2)
            suffix_paren = match.group(3)
            shortened_content = self.process_content_string(content)
            if shortened_content:
                start, end = match.span()
                new_part = f"{prefix_paren}{shortened_content}{suffix_paren}"
                new_filename = new_filename[:start] + new_part + new_filename[end:]
        return new_filename

    def find_target_pdf(self, root_dir, l1_path, sub_path, sub_name):
        if sub_path and os.path.exists(sub_path):
            pdfs_in_sub = [f for f in os.scandir(sub_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            if pdfs_in_sub: return pdfs_in_sub[0]
        
        if l1_path and os.path.exists(l1_path):
            pdfs_in_parent = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_parent:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf

        if root_dir and os.path.exists(root_dir):
            pdfs_in_root = [f for f in os.scandir(root_dir) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
            for pdf in pdfs_in_root:
                if sub_name in pdf.name: return pdf
        return None

    def run_process(self):
        try:
            root_dir = self.src_path.get()
            pdf_out_dir = self.pdf_dst_path.get()
            excel_path = self.excel_save_path.get()

            if not all([root_dir, pdf_out_dir, excel_path]):
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "请填写所有路径！"))
                return

            if not os.path.exists(pdf_out_dir):
                os.makedirs(pdf_out_dir)

            self.log(f"--- 任务启动 ---")
            
            project_roll_counts = {}
            level1_folders = [] 
            pattern_l1 = re.compile(r'^([Kk]\d{4}-\d+)\s*[（\(]\s*(\d+)\s*[）\)]\s*[（\(](.*)[）\)]\s*$')

            entries = list(os.scandir(root_dir))
            for entry in entries:
                if entry.is_dir():
                    match = pattern_l1.match(entry.name)
                    if match:
                        pid = match.group(1).upper()
                        project_roll_counts[pid] = project_roll_counts.get(pid, 0) + 1
                        level1_folders.append({
                            'path': entry.path,
                            'folder_name': entry.name,
                            'project_id': pid,
                            'roll_num': match.group(2),
                            'survey_raw': match.group(3)
                        })
            
            self.log(f"预扫描完成，本文件夹发现 {len(level1_folders)} 个卷。")

            table_rows = []
            for folder_info in level1_folders:
                l1_path = folder_info['path']
                l1_name = folder_info['folder_name']
                project_id = folder_info['project_id']
                total_rolls = project_roll_counts[project_id]
                roll_num = folder_info['roll_num']
                expanded_survey = self.expand_survey_numbers(folder_info['survey_raw'])

                sub_folders = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_dir()]
                sub_folders.sort(key=lambda x: x.name)

                # A. 有子文件夹
                if sub_folders:
                    total_books = len(sub_folders)
                    processed_book_nums = set()
                    
                    for sub in sub_folders:
                        match_l2 = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', sub.name)
                        book_num = match_l2.group(1) if match_l2 else "1"
                        processed_book_nums.add(book_num)
                        
                        img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(sub.path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                        
                        final_pdf_name = ""
                        target_pdf = self.find_target_pdf(root_dir, l1_path, sub.path, sub.name)
                        if target_pdf:
                            if "（" in sub.name or "(" in sub.name:
                                matches = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', sub.name))
                                if matches:
                                    last_idx = matches[-1].start()
                                    suffix = sub.name[last_idx:]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            else:
                                temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{sub.name}.pdf"
                            
                            final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                            try:
                                shutil.move(target_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                                final_pdf_name = final_name
                                self.log(f"  [归档] {target_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                            except Exception as e:
                                self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                        table_rows.append({
                            '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                            '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                            '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                            'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                        })

                    # 补漏扫描
                    l1_pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    for orphan_pdf in l1_pdfs:
                        match_orphan = re.search(r'[（\(]\d+-(\d+)[）\)]', orphan_pdf.name)
                        if match_orphan:
                            orphan_book_num = match_orphan.group(1)
                            if orphan_book_num not in processed_book_nums:
                                self.log(f"  [补漏] 发现孤儿 PDF: {orphan_pdf.name}")
                                matches_p = list(re.finditer(r'[（\(]', orphan_pdf.name))
                                if matches_p:
                                    last_idx = matches_p[-1].start()
                                    suffix = orphan_pdf.name[last_idx:]
                                    if suffix.lower().endswith('.pdf'): suffix = suffix[:-4]
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}{suffix}.pdf"
                                else:
                                    temp_name = f"{l1_name}_{orphan_pdf.name}"

                                final_name_orphan = self.shorten_filename_logic(temp_name)
                                final_pdf_name_orphan = ""
                                try:
                                    shutil.move(orphan_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name_orphan))
                                    final_pdf_name_orphan = final_name_orphan
                                    self.log(f"  [归档] 孤儿 PDF -> {final_name_orphan}")
                                except Exception as e:
                                    self.log(f"  [错误] 移动孤儿 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                                table_rows.append({
                                    '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                                    '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': orphan_book_num,
                                    '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': 0, 'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name_orphan
                                })

                # B. 无子文件夹
                else:
                    total_books = 1
                    book_num = 1
                    img_count = sum(1 for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith(('.jpg','.png','.jpeg')))
                    
                    src_pdf = None
                    pdfs = [f for f in os.scandir(l1_path) if f.is_file() and f.name.lower().endswith('.pdf')]
                    if pdfs:
                        src_pdf = pdfs[0]
                    else:
                        target_name = l1_name + ".pdf"
                        potential_path = os.path.join(root_dir, target_name)
                        if os.path.exists(potential_path):
                            src_pdf = type('obj', (object,), {'name': target_name, 'path': potential_path})

                    final_pdf_name = ""
                    if src_pdf:
                        final_name = self.shorten_filename_logic(src_pdf.name)
                        try:
                            shutil.move(src_pdf.path, os.path.join(pdf_out_dir, final_name))
                            final_pdf_name = final_name
                            self.log(f"  [归档] {src_pdf.name} -> {final_name}")
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.log(f"  [错误] 移动 PDF 失败: {str(e)}")

                    table_rows.append({
                        '工号': project_id, '总卷数': total_rolls, '本卷序号': roll_num,
                        '卷总本数': total_books, '分卷序号': book_num,
                        '包含勘察号': expanded_survey, '本册页数': img_count,
                        'pdf文件名称': final_pdf_name
                    })

            # ================= 智能去重逻辑 =================
            if table_rows:
                new_df = pd.DataFrame(table_rows)
                cols = ['工号', '总卷数', '本卷序号', '卷总本数', '分卷序号', '包含勘察号', '本册页数', 'pdf文件名称']
                new_df = new_df[cols]

                if os.path.exists(excel_path):
                    try:
                        self.log(f"\n📂 发现已有台账，准备智能合并...")
                        existing_df = pd.read_excel(excel_path)
                        
                        combined_df = pd.concat([existing_df, new_df], ignore_index=True)
                        before_count = len(combined_df)

                        cols_to_fix = ['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号']
                        for col in cols_to_fix:
                            combined_df[col] = combined_df[col].astype(str).str.strip()

                        combined_df['pdf文件名称'] = combined_df['pdf文件名称'].fillna('')

                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号', 'pdf文件名称'], 
                                              ascending=[True, True, True, False], 
                                              inplace=True)

                        combined_df.drop_duplicates(subset=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], keep='first', inplace=True)
                        
                        combined_df.sort_values(by=['工号', '本卷序号', '分卷序号'], inplace=True)
                        
                        after_count = len(combined_df)
                        self.log(f"   - 智能合并: 清除了 {before_count - after_count} 条重复记录")
                        final_df = combined_df

                    except Exception as e:
                        self.log(f"⚠️ 读取旧台账失败，将覆盖文件: {str(e)}")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                        final_df = new_df
                else:
                    self.log(f"\n📄 新建台账文件: {excel_path}")
                    final_df = new_df

                final_df.to_excel(excel_path, index=False)
                self.log(f"✅ 写入完成！总台账现有 {len(final_df)} 条记录。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(True, f"处理完成！\n智能合并后共 {len(final_df)} 条记录。"))
            else:
                self.log("⚠️ 未找到有效数据，未更新台账。")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, "未找到有效数据"))

        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"❌ 发生未知错误: {str(e)}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self.root.after(0, lambda: self.finish_process(False, str(e)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        myappid = 'company.pdf_tool.v10.1' 
        ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID(myappid)
    except Exception:
        pass

    root = tk.Tk()
    app = UnifiedPDFTool(root)
    root.mainloop()
